title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE SITIO OF PANTOK, MUNICIPALITY OF MEYCAUAYAN, PROVINCE OF BULACAN, INTO A BARRIO TO BE KNOWN AS THE BARRIO OF PANTOK.

chunks.text:
H. No. 631 / 55 OG No. 22, 4012 (June 1, 1959)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2155, April 24, 1959 ]

AN ACT CONVERTING THE SITIO OF PANTOK, MUNICIPALITY OF MEYCAUAYAN, PROVINCE OF BULACAN, INTO A BARRIO TO BE KNOWN AS THE BARRIO OF PANTOK.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The sitio of Pantok, Municipality of Meycauayan, Province of Bulacan, is converted into a barrio of said municipality to be known as the barrio of Pantok.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without executive approval, April 24, 1959.
